name: health-os
description: Local-first personal health record with grounded, citation-checked agent skills

interface.shortDescription: Grounded timeline and review skills over your own health records
interface.longDescription: Health OS is a local-first personal health record for coding agents. Its core syncs your records from your health systems' patient-access FHIR APIs to a versioned local store with full provenance, and its skills present that record — timelines today, visit prep and cross-specialty review next — with a citation on every stated fact.
defaultPrompt: What labs are on my record since January?
Show my medication history with citations.
